---
title: "Presentation Title"
subtitle: "Subtitle"
author:
  - Author Name
contactauthor: Author Name
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
occasion: "Conference Name"
email: username@leibniz-bips.de
output:
  bipsdown::bips_beamer:
    keep_tex: false
---

## Introduction

- This is a BIPS beamer presentation
- Written in RMarkdown
- No need to copy any template files

## Methods

- The `bips_beamer()` format bundles all assets
- Uses Fira fonts and 16:9 by default
- Pass `themeoptions`, `aspectratio`, etc. to customize

## Results

- Point one
- Point two

## Conclusion

- We did science
- It was quite interesting
